title: Faulks & Cox Tubtrugs 26L Medium Flexible 2-Handled Recycled Tub, Pistachio, SP26PST
features: Frost and UV resistant; totally phalate free
Safe for livestock, pets, fish and completely safe for children also babies
description: Product Description FCL Tubtrugs flexible 2 handled recycled tub perfect for gardening, household, DIY, bedroom storage, toys, arts and crafts, educational, schools, garage, boating, beach, shopping, catering or for pets, livestock and many more. Comfort-grip handles, ideal for carrying in one hand. Chamfered edge for easy sweeping. Flexible sides for shaping against a wall or floor. Super-strong handle joints. Reinforced ribbing for extra strength. Food grade, brand leader, non-toxic, environment friendly, frost resistant, UV ray resistant and toy safe. Available in pistachio colour. It comes in medium size. 26 litre capacity. Measures 39cm diameter by 30cm height. Box Contains 1 x Tubtrug Tub
